import string
import io
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < list.len(xs)
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if not removed and v == target
        removed = true
      else
        out = list.push(out, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums = parse_tokens(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  mut take = k
  if take > list.len(nums)
    take = list.len(nums)
  end

  mut remaining = nums
  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      if i == 0
        output = "#{m}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{m}"
      end
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(output)
end
